name: athena-duckdb
description: Query Amazon Athena and ingest into DuckDB

aws_access_key_id.title: AWS access key ID
aws_access_key_id.description: AWS access key ID used to authenticate to Athena

aws_secret_access_key.title: AWS secret access key
aws_secret_access_key.description: AWS secret access key paired with the access key ID

output_location.title: S3 output location
output_location.description: S3 URI where Athena should write query results (e.g., s3://bucket/path/)

errorMessage.pattern: Must be an S3 URI (e.g., s3://bucket/path/)

sql.title: SQL
sql.description: SQL query to run against your warehouse

files.name: connector
files.code_template:
# Connector YAML
# Reference documentation: [[ .docs_url ]]
type: connector
driver: athena
[[ renderProps .config_props ]]

files.name: model
files.code_template:
# Model YAML
# Reference documentation: https://docs.rilldata.com/developers/build/connectors/data-source/athena

type: model
[[ if .connector_name -]]
connector: "[[ .connector_name ]]"
[[ end -]]
materialize: true
[[ if .sql -]]
sql: |
  [[ .sql | indent 2 ]]

dev:
  sql: |
    [[ .sql ]] limit 10000
[[ end -]]
